ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours the employee works per week */,
  "work_pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work pattern */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "date_of_hire" TEXT /* Date of hire */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Termination date */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  "avatar" TEXT /* URL of the employee's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_work_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_pattern_id") REFERENCES work_patterns ("work_pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scrum_teams" (
  "scrum_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scrum team */,
  "scrum_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the scrum team */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the scrum team belongs to */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "team_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the team */,
  "team_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scrum_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scrum_teams_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scrum_teams_team_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "department_head_email" TEXT /* Email of the department head */,
  "department_head_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department head */,
  "department_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_patterns" (
  "work_pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work pattern */,
  "work_pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the work pattern */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the work pattern */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the work pattern */,
  "days_worked_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of days worked per week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scrum_team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "scrum_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scrum team */,
  "scrum_team_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the employee has in the scrum team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the membership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the membership */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics for the membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scrum_team_memberships_scrum_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("scrum_team_id") REFERENCES scrum_teams ("scrum_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scrum_team_memberships_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
column_names: Number of hours the employee works per week
Phone number of the emergency contact
Unique identifier for each scrum team
ID of the department the scrum team belongs to
Phone number of the department head
Unique identifier for each work pattern
Start time of the work pattern
End time of the work pattern
Number of days worked per week
Contact phone number of the location
ID of the role the employee has in the scrum team
